  "weights": {

    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.3,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,

  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request 'Polish this' centers on sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, flow, and concision without altering content.",
    "RX.1": "Polishing should preserve or appropriately express existing uncertainty and hedging rather than remove it.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid inadvertently strengthening claims or introducing overstatements relative to the original text.",
    "RX.3": "Scope is limited to stylistic and clarity edits and must not expand into reanalysis, restructuring, or content changes.",
    "RX.4": "Polish should not introduce misleading technical phrasing that could cause misuse in real-world settings.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain original technical meaning, units, and data descriptions so changes remain traceable to the source text."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request 'Polish this' centers on sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, flow, and concision without altering content.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing should preserve or appropriately express existing uncertainty and hedging rather than remove it.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid inadvertently strengthening claims or introducing overstatements relative to the original text.
rationale.RX.3: Scope is limited to stylistic and clarity edits and must not expand into reanalysis, restructuring, or content changes.
rationale.RX.4: Polish should not introduce misleading technical phrasing that could cause misuse in real-world settings.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain original technical meaning, units, and data descriptions so changes remain traceable to the source text.
